name: martix-fluent-ui
summary: React-first Fluent UI v9 engineering with accessible composition, tokens, Griffel, SSR, migration, and ecosystem routing.
abstract: Use this standalone skill for @fluentui/react-components package selection, FluentProvider and theme setup, token-driven styling, slots and compound components, accessibility and focus, Next.js SSR, icons, motion, charts, v8 or v0 migration, and the exceptional Vue Web Components path.

executionProfile.humanInTheLoop: Review public component APIs, accessibility behavior, and migration cutovers.

companionSkills.name: martix-typescript
companionSkills.handoffWhen: The task requires TypeScript API design, tsconfig, module resolution, declarations, or type-level tests beyond Fluent UI usage.

companionSkills.name: martix-sharepoint-spfx
companionSkills.handoffWhen: Fluent UI is embedded in an SPFx solution and SharePoint host, packaging, deployment, or theme-variant behavior becomes primary.

relationships.handoffPolicy: Keep Fluent UI package, component, styling, accessibility, and migration decisions here; open a companion skill for the companion's owned concern without duplicating its rules.
